description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.5.1 Docker image with a cache of vendor/ruby and a before_script that runs ruby -v, apt-get update -q && apt-get install nodejs -yqq, gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, and bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor. Define a test stage containing an rspec job that executes bundle exec rspec spec, uses the redis:latest service, and sets the REDIS_URL variable to redis://redis:6379. Add a rubocop job in the same test stage that runs bundle exec rubocop. Include a deploy job of type deploy targeting the production environment that runs gem install dpl followed by dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APP_NAME --api-key=$HEROKU_PRODUCTION_KEY.
